zh.Saluzzo, Cuneo, Piedmont, Italy: 義大利皮蒙特辛薩盧左
zh.Saluzzo-Cuneo, Piedmont, Italy: 義大利皮蒙特辛薩盧左
zh.lifeSummary: 當Guglielmo I del Vasto, Marquis di Ceva於大約1145年出生在義大利皮蒙特辛薩盧左時，他的父親Anselme I del Vasto de Clavesane47歲，母親Anne Marie del Vento22歲。他於1179年與Donna Maria di Vento在義大利皮蒙特辛薩盧左結婚。他們至少是4個兒子的父母。他去世於1219年在他的家鄉享年75歲，埋葬在義大利皮蒙特辛薩盧左。

zh-hans.Saluzzo, Cuneo, Piedmont, Italy: 意大利皮蒙特辛薩盧左
zh-hans.Saluzzo-Cuneo, Piedmont, Italy: 意大利皮蒙特辛薩盧左
zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Guglielmo I del Vasto, Marquis di Ceva于大约1145年出生在意大利皮蒙特辛薩盧左时，他的父亲Anselme I del Vasto de Clavesane47岁，母亲Anne Marie del Vento22岁。他于1179年与Donna Maria di Vento在意大利皮蒙特辛薩盧左结婚。他们至少是4个儿子的父母。他去世于1219年在他的家乡享年75岁，埋葬在意大利皮蒙特辛薩盧左。

nameMeanings.name: del
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: French (Lorraine): variant of the habitational name Delle 2 or a masculine form of a homonymous topographic name. — Note: In the population figure published by the US Census Bureau, the Spanish or Italian preposition with fused definite article del ‘of the’, which forms first part of surnames such as Del Cid and Del Signore , has apparently been in some instances counted as an independent surname.

variants.name: Delle
meanings: German: habitational name from a place so named in North Rhine-Westphalia or a topographic name (see   Dell  ).

French (Lorraine): habitational name from Delle, a place in Territoire de Belfort. Alternatively, a topographic name, with fused preposition d(e) ‘from’, for someone who lived near a prominent alder tree or trees, from elle, a derivative of Middle High German erle ‘alder’.

nameMeanings.name: Vasto,
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Italian Salvatore, Alfio, Carmelo, Mariano, Pasquale, Angelina, Carmine, Gaetano, Gerardo, Guillermo, Leonardo, Lucio, Rocco, Rosario, Sal, Sebastiano.

variants.name: Vastola
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Italian Alfonso, Amedeo, Carmine, Dino, Emileo, Salvator.
Italian (Campania; Vàstola): probably a derivative of Vasta .

variants.name: Basta
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Arabic/Muslim Nabil, Adly, Attia, Hakeem, Hassan, Karim, Makram, Medhat, Mervat, Mohamed, Onsy, Sameh.

Italian (southern): perhaps from the personal name Basta, from basta ‘that's enough!’ (i.e. enough children in the family). Since the surname is found among the Albanian speakers of Calabria and Sicily, it may alternatively be of Albanian origin, probably related to 4 below.
Polish: from a pet form of the personal name   Bastian   (short form of   Sebastian  ).

nameMeanings.name: Guglielmo
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.

variants.name: William
meanings: Probably the most successful of all the Old French names of Germanic origin that were introduced to England by the Normans. It is derived from Germanic wil ‘will, desire’ + helm ‘helmet, protection’. The fact that it was borne by the Conqueror himself does not seem to have inhibited its favour with the ‘conquered’ population: in the first century after the Conquest it was the commonest male name of all, and not only among the Normans. In the later Middle Ages it was overtaken by John , but continued to run second to that name until the 20th century, when the picture became more fragmented.

en.lifeSummary: When Guglielmo I del Vasto, Marquis di Ceva was born about 1145, in Saluzzo, Cuneo, Piedmont, Italy, his father, Anselme I del Vasto de Clavesane, was 47 and his mother, Anne Marie del Vento, was 22. He married Donna Maria di Vento in 1179, in Saluzzo, Cuneo, Piedmont, Italy. They were the parents of at least 4 sons. He died in 1219, in his hometown, at the age of 75, and was buried in Saluzzo, Cuneo, Piedmont, Italy.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Guglielmo I del Vasto, Marquis di Ceva est né environ 1145, à Saluzzo, Cuneo, Piemonte, Italie, son père, Anselme I del Vasto de Clavesane, avait 47 ans et sa mère, Anne Marie del Vento, avait 22 ans. Il a épousé Donna Maria di Vento en 1179, à Saluzzo, Cuneo, Piemonte, Italie. Ils ont eu au moins 4 fils. Il est décédé en 1219, dans sa ville natale, à l’âge de 75 ans, et a été enterré à Saluzzo, Cuneo, Piemonte, Italie.

de.lifeSummary: Als Guglielmo I del Vasto, Marquis di Ceva um 1145 in Saluzzo, Cuneo, Piemonte, Italien geboren wurde, war sein Vater Anselme I del Vasto de Clavesane 47 und seine Mutter Anne Marie del Vento 22. Er hat 1179 in Saluzzo, Cuneo, Piemonte, Italien Donna Maria di Vento geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 4 Söhne. Er starb 1219 im Alter von 75 Jahren in seinem Geburtsort und wurde in Saluzzo, Cuneo, Piemonte, Italien begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Guglielmo I del Vasto, Marquis di Ceva è nato il circa 1145 nel Saluzzo, Cuneo, Piemonte, Italia, il suo padre, Anselme I del Vasto de Clavesane, aveva 47 anni e il suo madre, Anne Marie del Vento, aveva 22 anni. Lui sposato Donna Maria di Vento nel 1179, nel Saluzzo, Cuneo, Piemonte, Italia. Erano genitori di almeno 4 figli. Morì nel 1219, nel sua cittadina, all'età di 75 anni, e fu sepolto a Saluzzo, Cuneo, Piemonte, Italia.

ja.Saluzzo, Cuneo, Piedmont, Italy: イタリアピエモントクウネオサルズゾ
ja.Saluzzo-Cuneo, Piedmont, Italy: イタリアピエモントクウネオサルズゾ
ja.Ceva, Cuneo, Piemonte, Italie: イタリアピエモントクウネオセヴァ
ja.lifeSummary: Guglielmo I del Vasto, Marquis di Cevaが約1145年にイタリアピエモントクウネオサルズゾで生まれた時，父Anselme I del Vasto de Clavesaneは47歳，母Anne Marie del Ventoは22歳であった。1179年にイタリアピエモントクウネオサルズゾでDonna Maria di Ventoと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも4人の息子の親であった。彼は1219年に故郷で75歳で死去し，イタリアピエモントクウネオサルズゾにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Guglielmo I del Vasto, Marquis di Ceva(이)가 대략 1145년 이탈리아 피몽 쿤오 살루즈오에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Anselme I del Vasto de Clavesane(은)는 47세였고, 그의 어머니 Anne Marie del Vento(은)는 22세였다. 그는 1179년 이탈리아 피몽 쿤오 살루즈오에서 Donna Maria di Vento(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 네 명의 아들을 두었다. 그는 1219년 그의 고향에서 75세의 나이로 사망했으며 이탈리아 피몽 쿤오 살루즈오에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Guglielmo I del Vasto, Marquis di Ceva nasceu aproximadamente 1145, em Saluzzo, Cuneo, Piemonte, Itália, seu pai, Anselme I del Vasto de Clavesane, tinha 47 anos e sua mãe, Anne Marie del Vento, tinha 22 anos. Ele casou-se com Donna Maria di Vento em 1179, em Saluzzo, Cuneo, Piemonte, Itália. Eles tiveram pelo menos 4 filhos. Ele faleceu em 1219, em sua cidade natal, com 75 anos, e foi sepultado em Saluzzo, Cuneo, Piemonte, Itália.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Guglielmo I del Vasto, Marquis di Ceva родился около 1145 г. в местности салуззо, кунео, пиемонт, Италия, его отцу по имени Anselme I del Vasto de Clavesane было 47 лет, а матери, которую звали Anne Marie del Vento, 22. Он женился на женщине по имени Donna Maria di Vento в 1179 г. в местности салуззо, кунео, пиемонт, Италия. У них было по крайней мере 4 сына. Он умер в 1219 г. в его родном городе в возрасте 75 лет и был похоронен в местности салуззо, кунео, пиемонт, Италия.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Guglielmo I del Vasto, Marquis di Ceva nació aproximadamente 1145, en Saluzzo, Cuneo, Piemonte, Italia, su papá, Anselme I del Vasto de Clavesane, tenía 47 años y su mamá, Anne Marie del Vento, tenía 22 años. Se casó con Donna Maria di Vento en 1179, en Saluzzo, Cuneo, Piemonte, Italia. Fueron padres de por lo menos 4 hijos. Murió en 1219, en su pueblo, a la edad de 75 años, y fue sepultado en Saluzzo, Cuneo, Piemonte, Italia.
